widget.name: Avatar
widget.description: Display a user profile image, initials or a fallback icon

property.caption: Image source
property.description: URL of the image to display. If empty, initials or a fallback icon are shown.

property.caption: Name
property.description: Used as the alt text and to derive initials when no image is set

property.caption: Size
property.description: Key of theme sizes (xs–xl) or a number of pixels

property.caption: Radius
property.description: Key of theme.radius, a CSS value, or a percentage. Leave empty for a circular avatar.

property.caption: Color
property.description: Placeholder/initials color. Use "initials" for a color derived from the name.
